channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Golf goes indoors on prime time with high-tech TGL league
item.description: PALM BEACH GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — Xander Schauffele is making his season debut twice in the span of seven days at venues separated by a lot more than some 5,000 miles.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: New Orleans police official gives message to NFL fans on fence about attending Super Bowl LIX after attack
item.description: New Orleans Police Superintendent Anne Kirkpatrick gave a message to fans who are on the fence about attending the Super Bowl in February after a terror attack.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Pro Bowl rosters include 9 Ravens, 7 Lions, 6 Vikings and Eagles and no Patrick Mahomes
item.description: Nine Baltimore Ravens, including two-time NFL MVP Lamar Jackson and Derrick Henry, were selected for the Pro Bowl Games. The Detroit Lions are next with seven players and the Minnesota Vikings and Philadelphia Eagles each have six players on the NFC roster.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Sugar Bowl security beefed up to Super Bowl levels, official says
item.description: New Orleans Police Department Superintendent Anne Kirkpatrick said Sugar Bowl security will be beefed up to Super Bowl levels ahead and during the game.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Mikaela Shiffrin aiming to be back on snow 'in the next week or so' following November crash
item.description: Mikaela Shiffrin is back in the gym and aiming to be on snow “in the next week or so,” the American skiing star said more than a month after suffering a deep puncture wound in her hip area. The serious injury occurred during a during a crash on Nov. 30 in Killington, Vermont.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Top-seeded Oregon sees title hopes dashed with early knockout by Ohio State
item.description: PASADENA, Calif. (AP) — Oregon withstood many challenges en route to being the only unbeaten team and the top seed in the College Football Playoff.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: No. 6 Ohio State routs top-ranked Oregon 41-21 in the Rose Bowl, advances to CFP semifinals
item.description: PASADENA, Calif. (AP) — Second chances don’t come around often in life, Ohio State coach Ryan Day told his players in a team meeting before the Rose Bowl.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Aaron Rodgers says Jets' season finale vs. Dolphins could be his last NFL game
item.description: Aaron Rodgers was questioned by reporters on Wednesday whether the Jets' season finale against the Dolphins could be his final NFL game, and he said 'of course'
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Penn State takes simple approach during ride into CFP semifinals
item.description: GLENDALE, Ariz. (AP) — Football coaches, perhaps more than in other sports, are huge proponents of structure, routine, consistent messaging. Since the early days of his time in Happy Valley, Penn State's James Franklin has adhered to the philosophy of 1-0. Yes, it's a cliche.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sugar Bowl CFP quarterfinal between Georgia and Notre Dame postponed after deadly truck attack
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — The College Football Playoff quarterfinal at the Sugar Bowl between Georgia and Notre Dame was postponed a day because of an attack about a mile away from the Superdome early Wednesday, when authorities say a truck driver deliberately plowed into a New Year’s crowd and killed 15 p
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Camarillo High School to honor NBA star alumnus with jersey retirement
item.description: Camarillo High School will honor one of its most successful alumni when it retires the No. 24 jersey of Jaime Jaquez Jr. later this month.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Kiszla, KTLA 5

item.title: Former Princeton football player Tiger Bech killed in New Orleans attack
item.description: Former Princeton football player Tiger Bech is one of at least 10 identified deceased victims of Wednesday's attack in New Orleans.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: LeBron James' youngest son Bryce commits to Arizona
item.description: TUCSON, Ariz. (AP) — Bryce James, son of NBA star LeBron James, is heading to Arizona. Bryce James announced his decision Wednesday on Instagram and his father had a quick response. “CONGRATULATIONS MAXIMUS!!,” LeBron James posted.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fox News Digital Sports NFL power rankings after Week 17 of the 2024 season
item.description: The 2024 NFL regular season winds down next weekend with two division titles left to play for and the rest of the playoffs to be decided.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Blues have all the fun in convincing victory over the Blackhawks in the Winter Classic
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — St. Louis coach Jim Montgomery walked around before Tuesday night's Winter Classic. He looked at the growing crowd soaking in the festive atmosphere. He thought about all the famous ballplayers who played at Wrigley Field.
item.dc:creator: JAY COHEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rangers putting goalie Igor Shesterkin on IR with an upper body injury, AP source says
item.description: New York Rangers goaltender Igor Shesterkin is going on injured reserve, according to a person with knowledge of the decision. The person spoke to The Associated Press on condition of anonymity Tuesday because the moved had not been announced. The person said Shesterkin has an upper-body injury.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: PHOTOS: Blues, Blackhawks close 2024 with the Winter Classic
item.description: It's Winter Classic Day in the Windy City on New Year's Eve. The ultimate outdoor hockey showdown between the cross-state rival St. Louis Blues and Chicago Blackhawks is underway.
item.dc:creator: Joey Schneider, WGN 9

item.title: How the Chicago Blackhawks brought the St. Louis Blues to life
item.description: As the St. Louis Blues and Chicago Blackhawks gear up for the 2025 NHL Winter Classic, it's worth revisiting a fascinating piece of hockey history: The Blues franchise, as St. Louis knows it today, might not exist without a helping hand from their cross-state rival.
item.dc:creator: Joey Schneider, WGN 9

item.title: Blues dominate Blackhawks 6-2 in Discover NHL Winter Classic
item.description: The St. Louis Blues and Chicago Blackhawks will close the 2024 calendar year with a head-to-head battle outdoors: The NHL Discover Winter Classic.
item.dc:creator: Joey Schneider, WGN 9

item.title: LeBron James at 40: A milestone birthday arrives Monday for the NBA's all-time scoring leader
item.description: When LeBron James broke another NBA record earlier this month, the one for most regular-season minutes played in a career, his Los Angeles Lakers teammates handled the moment in typical locker room fashion. They made fun of him. “They told me I’m old as hell,” James quipped.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bills clinch the AFC's No. 2 seed with a 40-14 rout of the undisciplined Jets
item.description: ORCHARD PARK, N.Y. (AP) — Josh Allen reflected on Buffalo’s many offseason critics and doubters when asked about the Bills achieving their latest milestones while sewing up the AFC’s No. 2 seed with a 40-14 rout of the unraveling and undisciplined New York Jets on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jake Evans scores for the career-high 4th consecutive game, surging Canadiens beat Lightning 5-2
item.description: Jake Evans scored for the career-high fifth consecutive game and the surging Montreal Canadiens beat the Tampa Bay Lightning 5-2 on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: ERIK ERLENDSSON Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Mayfield throws 5 TD passes and Bucs keep playoff, NFC South hopes alive with 48-14 rout of Panthers
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — The Tampa Bay Buccaneers played like a team determined to do whatever's necessary to make the playoffs.
item.dc:creator: FRED GOODALL, Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Lakers send D'Angelo Russell to Nets in trade for Dorian Finney-Smith, Shake Milton
item.description: The Los Angeles Lakers have traded guard D'Angelo Russell to the Brooklyn Nets for forward Dorian Finney-Smith and guard Shake Milton. The Lakers also sent forward Maxwell Lewis and three second-round draft picks to Brooklyn on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Report: Cubs deal former 1B prospect Matt Mervis to Marlins for utilityman
item.description: The Cubs have traded one former infield prospect for another. ESPN's Jeff Passan reported on his X feed early Sunday afternoon that the Cubs have dealt first baseman Matt Mervis to the Miami Marlins for utilityman Vidal Bruján, according to sources.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Lakers trade former All-Star to Brooklyn
item.description: For the second time in his NBA career, D'Angelo Russell has been traded from the Los Angeles Lakers to the Brooklyn Nets.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Colorado football fans face a dramatic week across three teams
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—Colorado football fans experienced a week filled with high-stakes action, featuring the Denver Broncos chasing a playoff berth and the Colorado Buffaloes and Colorado State Rams battling in bowl games.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Southern California overcomes 17-point deficit to beat Texas A&M 35-31 in Las Vegas Bowl
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — The Southern California Trojans ended their season the way they started it. On Sept. 1 at Allegiant Stadium in the opener, the Trojans overcame a third-quarter deficit and scored with eight seconds left to beat LSU 27-20.
item.dc:creator: W.G. RAMIREZ, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Bulls take on the Bucks on 3-game skid
item.description: Milwaukee Bucks (16-13, fifth in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (13-18, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Saturday, 8 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: Chicago enters the matchup against Milwaukee after losing three straight games. The Bulls are 2-5 against division opponents.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Bears lose rain-soaked rock fight to the Seahawks, drop franchise record-tying 10th straight game
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago Bears final home game of the season against the Seattle Seahawks was offense optional, as rain poured down on Soldier Field in what amounted to a cold, wet rock fight. "I thought special teams played very well.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: At least 65 million tune in for Netflix NFL Christmas Day games. NBA holiday ratings also skyrocket
item.description: LeBron James and the NBA are going to have make room for the NFL on Christmas. That shouldn't be a problem. Both leagues were winners on Wednesday. Netflix set records as the most-streamed NFL games in U.S. history while the NBA had its best holiday numbers in five years according to Nielsen.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY and TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Holiday Bowl to kick off at brand-new Snapdragon Stadium for the first time
item.description: The Holiday Bowl has been woven into the fabric of San Diego for four decades. For a football city without a professional sports team, there is even more excitement surrounding this annual event.
item.dc:creator: Jaime Chambers, Fox 5
